Icon Review Tracker

Per-icon review status, notes, and before/after for every reviewable canvas icon (in-use + alias targets). Archived/legacy icons are excluded. Generated from icon-review/manifest.json — re-run node tools/build-icon-tracker.mjs after each pass.

fruits 9/9

tile_fruit_apple
Reviewed · OKin-use
Apple

Exemplar. Gradient body, upper-left specular highlight, grounded shadow, single leaf+stem in bounds. No changes.

tile_fruit_blackberry
Reviewed · OKin-use
Blackberry

Backing oval + ~30 hex-packed drupelets clipped to body; reads as blackberry not grapes. Leaf+calyx grounded, in bounds. No changes.

tile_fruit_coconut
Reviewed · OKin-use
Coconut

Round brown husk with fibrous radial texture clipped to body and three eyes; specular highlight, in bounds. No changes.

tile_fruit_golden_apple
Reviewed · OKin-use
Golden Apple

Golden apple with tinted aura, sparkles contained, sheen arc, in bounds. Reads at small size. No changes.

tile_fruit_jackfruit
Reviewed · OKin-use
Jackfruit

Round body with bumpy diamond-spike skin texture clipped to body, stem+leaf grounded, highlight, in bounds. No changes.

tile_fruit_lemon
Reviewed · OKin-use
Lemon

Lemon shape with nub, gradient body, leaf+stem, pore texture, specular highlight, in bounds. No changes.

tile_fruit_pear
Reviewed · OKin-use
Pear

Good pear silhouette, gradient body, leaf+stem grounded, freckle texture reads, in bounds. No changes.

tile_fruit_rambutan
Fixedin-use
Rambutan

Old version had chaotic two-tone red/green spines radiating past the magenta box (urchin/virus look). Redrew as a round red gradient body with two layered rings of soft curved hair-spines (spinterns) all combing the same direction, reddish base with soft pale-pink tips, tips kept inside the ±26 safe area. Now reads as a rambutan, in bounds, grounded, consistent with siblings.

tile_fruit_starfruit
Reviewed · OKin-use
Starfruit

Carambola side view with scalloped rib ridges and two foreground star edges; leaf+stem grounded, sheen highlight, in bounds. Slightly jagged silhouette but recognizable and within bounds. No changes.
